IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: CHRISTIANA CARE HEALTH INITIATIVES, INC. SERVES TO SUPPORT THE CHRISTIANA CARE HEALTH SYSTEM AND ADD VALUE TO THE COMMUNITY.
IRS990.MissionDesc: CHRISTIANA CARE HEALTH INITIATIVES, INC. SERVES TO SUPPORT THE CHRISTIANA CARE HEALTH SYSTEM AND ADD VALUE TO THE COMMUNITY.
IRS990.Desc: CHRISTIANA CARE HEALTH INITIATIVES ("CCHI") PROVIDES A VARIETY OF HEALTHCARE SERVICES. CCHI PROVIDES SERVICES TO PATIENTS WHO MEET THE CRITERIA OF ITS CHARITY CARE SERVICE POLICY WITHOUT CHARGE OR AT AMOUNTS LESS THAN THE ESTABLISHED RATES. CCHI SUPPORTS THE CHRISTIANA CARE HEALTH SYSTEM AND ADDS VALUE TO THE COMMUNITY WITH A FOCUS ON LOWERING OVERALL HEALTH CARE COSTS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, SCHEDULE J, PART I, LINE 3
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: TOP MANAGEMENT COMPENSATION AS PROVIDED IN THE FORM 990, SCHEDULE J INSTRUCTIONS, SINCE THE ORGANIZATION RELIES ON A RELATED ORGANIZATION WHICH USES ONE OR MORE OF THE METHODS DESCRIBED IN LINE 3 TO ESTABLISH THE TOP MANAGEMENT OFFICIAL'S COMPENSATION, THIS QUESTION HAS BEEN LEFT UNANSWERED. REFER TO SCHEDULE O FOR A DESCRIPTION OF THE COMPENSATION REVIEW AND APPROVAL PROCESS. --------------------

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, SCHEDULE J, PART I, LINE 4B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: SUPPLEMENTAL NONQUALIFIED RETIREMENT PLAN CHRISTIANA CARE HEALTH INITIATIVES, INC. IS AN AFFILIATE OF CHRISTIANA CARE HEALTH SYSTEM, INC. ("CCHS"). CCHS MAINTAINS AN IRC SECTION 457(F) DEFERRED COMPENSATION PLAN. THE FOLLOWING INDIVIDUAL LISTED ON FORM 990, PART VII, SECTION A, LINE 1A PARTICIPATED IN THE CCHS 457(F) PLAN DURING THE YEAR AND RECEIVED A DISTRIBUTION: PATRICK GRUSENMEYER - $7,741 --------------------

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, SCHEDULE J, PART I, LINE 7
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: PROVISION OF NON-FIXED PAYMENTS ALL COMPENSATION ARRANGEMENTS ARE DETERMINED BY AND PAID THROUGH CCHS. CCHS PROVIDES DISCRETIONARY BONUS AND/OR INCENTIVE COMPENSATION PAYMENTS TO ELIGIBLE EMPLOYEES. PAYMENTS MADE TO ANY DISQUALIFIED PERSON IS APPROVED BY THE COMPENSATION COMMITTEE THROUGH THE PROCESS DESCRIBED IN FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15. --------------------

DETAIL OF OFFICER COMPENSATION PATRICK GRUSENMEYER PERFORMS SERVICES FOR CHRISTIANA HEALTH CARE INITIATIVES INC. AND OTHER CCHS-RELATED ORGANIZATIONS. THE COMPENSATION INFORMATION REPORTED REPRESENTS HIS TOTAL COMPENSATION EARNED FOR ALL SUCH SERVICES PERFORMED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 7A,B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GOVERNING BODY AND MANAGEMENT THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS OF CHRISTIANA CARE HEALTH SYSTEM, INC. ("SYSTEM"), SOLE MEMBER OF CHRISTIANA CARE HEALTH INITIATIVES, INC. ("CCHI"), AT IT'S ANNUAL MEETING IN NOVEMBER, ELECTS DIRECTORS OF CCHI. THE ANNUAL OPERATING BUDGET OF CCHI IS APPROVED BY THE CCHI BOARD, THE SYSTEM FINANCE COMMITTEE AND THE SYSTEM BOARD. --------------------

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: FORM 990 REVIEW PROCESS INFORMATION RELATED TO CCHI'S FORM 990 FILING IS GATHERED BY FINANCE STAFF AND PROVIDED TO PRICEWATERHOUSECOOPERS LLP FOR REVIEW. THE FINAL 2017 FORM 990 FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2018 WAS REVIEWED AND APPROVED BY VARIOUS SENIOR MANAGEMENT OFFICIALS. THE ORGANIZATION'S GOVERNING BOARD WAS ALSO PROVIDED ACCESS TO THE APPROVED 2017 FORM 990 VIA ITS BOARD OF DIRECTOR'S PORTAL. --------------------

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY OUR CONFLICT OF INTEREST ("COI") POLICY IS LOCATED IN THE DIRECTOR POLICY MANUAL. THERE IS AN ANNUAL MANDATORY EDUCATION FOR REQUIRED INDIVIDUALS WHICH INCLUDES AN ELECTRONIC SIGN OFF ACKNOWLEDGING COMPLETION OF THE EDUCATION, REPORTING OF A REAL OR PERCEIVED CONFLICT OR THAT NO CONFLICTS OF INTEREST EXISTS. THE HR/EMPLOYEE RELATIONS TEAM FOLLOWS UP WITH ANYONE WHO HAS A CONFLICT OR PERCEIVED CONFLICT OR DOES NOT COMPLETE THE EDUCATION IN ORDER TO RESOLVE. THE EMPLOYEE HANDBOOK SETS EXPECTATIONS FOR EMPLOYEE CONFLICTS OF INTEREST AND EXPECTATIONS. SEVERAL REPORTING MECHANISMS ALSO EXIST FOR EMPLOYEES TO REPORT CONCERNS. THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS HAS THEIR OWN COI POLICY. COI IS A STANDING AGENDA ITEM ON EACH BOARD OR BOARD COMMITTEE MEETING. BOARD MEMBERS EXPECTATIONS FOR COI ARE CLEARLY COMMUNICATED. --------------------

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: COMPENSATION REVIEW AND APROVAL THIS ORGANIZATION IS AN AFFILIATE OF CCHS. ALL COMPENSATION ARRANGEMENTS ARE DETERMINED BY AND PAID THROUGH CCHS. THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS ESTABLISHES CHRISTIANA CARE'S COMPETITIVE TOTAL COMPENSATION POLICY AND PRACTICE. THE EXECUTIVE COMPENSATION COMMITTEE ("ECC") OF THE BOARD ENGAGES AN INDEPENDENT THIRD PARTY ANNUALLY WHO ASSESSES DATA FROM SEVERAL MAJOR SURVEYS TO ENSURE TOTAL REMUNERATION IS MARKET COMPETITIVE AND QUALIFIES FOR THE "REBUTTABLE PRESUMPTION OF REASONABLENESS" UNDER THE INTERMEDIATE SANCTIONS RULE, SECTION 4958 OF THE INTERNAL REVENUE CODE. AFTER DELIBERATION, THE ECC DOCUMENTS THEIR DECISIONS IN MEETING MINUTES. -------------------- FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 16B JOINT VENTURE ARRANGEMENTS ALTHOUGH THE ORGANIZATION DOES NOT HAVE A WRITTEN POLICY IN PLACE REGARDING PARTICIPATION IN JOINT VENTURE RELATIONSHIPS, WHEN ANY SUCH RELATIONSHIPS ARE CONSIDERED, THEY ARE FIRST REVIEWED AND EVALUATED BY MANAGEMENT OFFICIALS IN CONJUNCTION WITH PRICEWATERHOUSECOOPERS LLP. --------------------

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GOVERNANCE, MGMT, AND DISCLOSURE THE FORM 990, GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, AUDITED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS, AND CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY OF CCHI ARE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST. --------------------

DisregardedEntityName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: CHRISTIANA CARE HOME HEALTH & COM SRVCS

RelatedOrganizationName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: THE DE CTR FOR MAT FETAL MED OF CC INC

AffiliatedGroupAttachment.MeduimExplanationTxt: DIRECT OTHER LOBBYING EXEMPT PURPOSE NAME OF ELECTING ORGANIZATION EXPENDITURES EXPENDITURES __________________________________ ____________ _______________ CHRISTIANA CARE HEALTH SYSTEM $ NONE $ 3,269,336 CHRISTIANA CARE HEALTH SERVICES 198,652 1,516,561,722 CHRISTIANA CARE HOME HEALTH AND COMMUNITY SERVICES NONE 45,376,090 CHRISTIANA CARE HEALTH INITIATIVES NONE 2,187,646 ------------ -------------- TOTAL $ 198,652 $ 1,567,394,794 THE ORGANIZATION HAS MADE THE LOBBYING ELECTION UNDER I.R.C. SECTION 501(H) FOR THE TAX YEAR ENDED JUNE 30, 2018. THIS ELECTION HAS NOT BEEN REVOKED BEFORE THE START OF THE ORGANIZATION'S TAX YEAR THAT BEGAN IN 2017.
